# Awakynn

> Awakynn is a yoga, meditation and Ayurvedic wellness platform based in Chinsurah, Hooghly, West Bengal, India. Founded and led by Monalisa, Awakynn offers live online classes via Google Meet as well as in-person sessions, serving students across Kolkata, Chinsurah, Chandannagar, Hooghly, Bandel, Serampore and the wider West Bengal region.

Awakynn's mission is to make authentic yoga and holistic wellness accessible to everyone — beginners, seniors, people with health conditions like arthritis, and those seeking deeper mental clarity.

## Offerings

- **Group Yoga Classes** — Live online and offline sessions covering Hatha, Vinyasa, restorative yoga and more. Suitable for all levels including absolute beginners and seniors.
- **Private 1-on-1 Yoga** — Personalised sessions tailored to the student's body, goals and health conditions.
- **Meditation & Breathwork (Pranayama)** — Guided meditation sessions and pranayama classes delivered via Google Meet.
- **Ayurvedic Diet Consulting** — One-on-one Ayurvedic nutrition guidance, including seasonal diet planning and dosha-based recommendations.
- **Mantra Chanting** — Sacred sound practice for mental clarity and spiritual alignment.
- **Mental Clarity Sessions** — Structured 1-on-1 sessions combining breath, mindfulness and intention-setting for focus and emotional balance.

## Location & Reach

- **Home base:** Chinsurah, Hooghly District, West Bengal, India (PIN: 712101)
- **Served areas (offline):** Chinsurah, Chandannagar, Hooghly, Bandel, Serampore, Rishra, Konnagar, Kolkata
- **Served areas (online):** All of India and internationally via Google Meet

- WhatsApp: +91 91132 93167

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://awakynn.com) — Brand overview, offerings gallery, instructor profile, testimonials
- [Class Board](https://awakynn.com/classes) — Live schedule of upcoming yoga and meditation sessions
- [Contact & Book](https://awakynn.com/contact) — Booking form, enquiry form, testimonial submission, FAQs

## Instructor

**Monalisa** is the founder and lead instructor at Awakynn. She teaches yoga, pranayama, meditation and Ayurvedic diet consulting. Awakynn's teaching team also includes resident doctors who advise students on suitability of practices for specific health conditions.

## Sister Brand

Awakynn is part of the same project as **Grabfabs** (https://grabfabs.com) — a healthy snack food brand by the same owner, also based in Chinsurah, West Bengal.
